code:
import { IconBox, IconEye, IconEyeOff, IconCode, IconInfoCircle, IconCopy, IconLink, IconLock, IconMail, IconScan, IconSend, IconShoppingCart, IconUser, IconCheck, IconLayoutGrid, IconX, IconCrown, IconCurrencyDollar, IconAtom, IconUsers, IconPlus, IconBrandTelegram, IconBrandFacebook, IconBrandTwitter, IconBrandWechat, IconWallet, IconSettings, IconDeviceDesktop, IconChevronDown, IconCreditCard, IconLogout, IconTicket, IconCalendar, IconQrcode, IconDeviceMobile, IconClipboard, IconArrowRight, IconArrowUp, IconShieldLock, IconLoader2, IconUserPlus, IconFileText, IconBrandApple, IconBrandAndroid, IconBrandWindows, IconBrandDebian, IconRouter, IconBrandFinder } from '@tabler/icons-vue';
export { IconBox, IconEye, IconEyeOff, IconCode, IconInfoCircle as IconInfo, IconCopy, IconLink, IconLock, IconMail, IconScan, IconSend, IconShoppingCart as IconShop, IconUser, IconCheck, IconLayoutGrid as IconClash, IconX as IconClose, IconCrown, IconCurrencyDollar as IconMoney, IconAtom as IconSurge, IconUsers, IconPlus as IconMore, IconBrandTelegram as IconTelegram, IconBrandFacebook as IconFacebook, IconBrandTwitter as IconTwitter, IconBrandWechat as IconWechat, IconWallet, IconSettings, IconDeviceDesktop as IconDashboard, IconChevronDown, IconCreditCard as IconCredit, IconLogout, IconTicket, IconCalendar, IconQrcode as IconQRCode, IconDeviceMobile as IconShadowrocket, IconClipboard as IconSubscription, IconArrowRight, IconArrowUp, IconShieldLock, IconUserPlus as IconInvite, IconLoader2 as IconSpinner, IconFileText, IconBrandApple as IconApple, IconBrandAndroid as IconAndroid, IconBrandWindows as IconWindows, IconBrandDebian as IconLinux, IconRouter, IconBrandFinder as IconMac };

sourcesContent:
import {
  IconBox,
  IconEye,
  IconEyeOff,
  IconCode,
  IconInfoCircle,
  IconCopy,
  IconLink,
  IconLock,
  IconMail,
  IconScan,
  IconSend,
  IconShoppingCart,
  IconUser,
  IconCheck,
  IconLayoutGrid,
  IconX,
  IconCrown,
  IconCurrencyDollar,
  IconAtom,
  IconUsers,
  IconPlus,
  IconBrandTelegram,
  IconBrandFacebook,
  IconBrandTwitter,
  IconBrandWechat,
  IconWallet,
  IconSettings,
  IconDeviceDesktop,
  IconChevronDown,
  IconCreditCard,
  IconLogout,
  IconTicket,
  IconCalendar,
  IconQrcode,
  IconDeviceMobile,
  IconClipboard,
  IconArrowRight,
  IconArrowUp,
  IconShieldLock,
  IconLoader2,
  IconUserPlus,
  IconFileText,
  IconBrandApple,
  IconBrandAndroid,
  IconBrandWindows,
  IconBrandDebian,
  IconRouter,
  IconBrandFinder
} from '@tabler/icons-vue';

export {
  IconBox,
  IconEye,
  IconEyeOff,
  IconCode,
  IconInfoCircle as IconInfo,
  IconCopy,
  IconLink,
  IconLock,
  IconMail,
  IconScan,
  IconSend,
  IconShoppingCart as IconShop,
  IconUser,
  IconCheck,
  IconLayoutGrid as IconClash,
  IconX as IconClose,
  IconCrown,
  IconCurrencyDollar as IconMoney,
  IconAtom as IconSurge,
  IconUsers,
  IconPlus as IconMore,
  IconBrandTelegram as IconTelegram,
  IconBrandFacebook as IconFacebook,
  IconBrandTwitter as IconTwitter,
  IconBrandWechat as IconWechat,
  IconWallet,
  IconSettings,
  IconDeviceDesktop as IconDashboard,
  IconChevronDown,
  IconCreditCard as IconCredit,
  IconLogout,
  IconTicket,
  IconCalendar,
  IconQrcode as IconQRCode,
  IconDeviceMobile as IconShadowrocket,
  IconClipboard as IconSubscription,
  IconArrowRight,
  IconArrowUp,
  IconShieldLock,
  IconUserPlus as IconInvite,
  IconLoader2 as IconSpinner,
  IconFileText,
  IconBrandApple as IconApple,
  IconBrandAndroid as IconAndroid,
  IconBrandWindows as IconWindows,
  IconBrandDebian as IconLinux,
  IconRouter,
  IconBrandFinder as IconMac
};
